### 1. MARKET OVERVIEW

While price action remains stagnant across the board (0% change), the underlying flow metrics indicate that selling pressure has neutralized most recovery attempts, leaving `fomolt` as the sole outlier showing sustained bid absorption (+48.6% NBP).
